content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed src/cli/project.rs, src/cli/task.rs, and tests/cli.rs. Implementation adds deprecation notices that correctly print to stderr (verified by project_select_prints_deprecation_notice_to_stderr_only), adds deprecation-aware help text (verified by project_help_mentions_deprecation_and_aliases), and skips notices on bootstrap/delete/amend as the prompt allows. The shared select_active_project helper is extracted cleanly and used by both project and task handlers; set_active_project validates existence before state mutation, so ordering is safe. All 244 CLI tests and 800 total tests pass; nix build passes; cargo fmt is clean. Clippy shows 27 errors but all are pre-existing on master (verified by checkout test); none introduced by this change. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
